title: Vintage Le Creuset Cast Iron Skillet / Small Saucepan No.16 – Made in France (1960–1970)
description:
Charming vintage small skillet from Le Creuset, made from high-quality cast iron and produced in France during the 1960–1970 period. This No.16 pan features a beautiful classic color and a timeless design typical of the brand.
Its compact size makes it perfect for preparing single portions, such as a fried egg, pancakes, crêpes, crispy bacon, or small sautéed dishes. The cast iron construction provides excellent heat distribution and heat retention, ensuring consistent and delicious cooking results.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset
Type: Small skillet / saucepan
Model: No. 16
Material: Cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Period: Vintage, 1960–1970
Compatible with all heat sources, including induction
Condition:
Good vintage condition. Please refer to the photos as they form part of the description.
A lovely and practical piece from the renowned French cookware brand Le Creuset, celebrated worldwide for its exceptional quality, durability, and collectible kitchenware. Perfect for everyday use or for collectors of vintage cookware.
